import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { CitizenDashboard } from '@ethds/templates';

  <CitizenDashboard
    name="Abebe"
    actionNeeded={true}
    applications={[
      { id: 'ETH-2026-0041', href: '/apps/ETH-2026-0041', service: 'Passport', status: 'Approved' },
      { id: 'ETH-2026-0042', href: '/apps/ETH-2026-0042', service: 'Business permit', status: 'Pending' },
    ]}
    appointments={[{ href: '/appointments/1', label: 'Bole office, Meskerem 5, 2019 EC' }]}
    payments={[{ href: '/receipts/1', label: 'ETB 350.00 receipt' }]}
    onStartNew={() => {}}
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'ßŖĀßłøßłŁßŖø' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="┬® 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

A signed-in citizen's home ŌĆö surfaces anything needing the citizen's
action first (a live-region `Notification`), then their applications,
appointments, and payments.

```tsx
import { CitizenDashboard } from '@ethds/templates';

<CitizenDashboard
  name="Abebe"
  actionNeeded={true}
  applications={applications}
  appointments={appointments}
  payments={payments}
  onStartNew={() => { /* navigate to a Service Landing Page */ }}
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* ŌĆ” */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this as the landing page after login, linking each application row to
its [Status Tracking](/docs/patterns/status-tracking) detail.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>` (the personalised greeting); the action-needed notification
  is checked and rendered **before** the citizen's records, so assistive
  technology encounters the most urgent content first.
- Status is always plain language (e.g. "Approved"), never an internal
  workflow code ŌĆö matching [Status Tracking](/docs/patterns/status-tracking)'s
  own guidance.
- `name`, every application/appointment/payment label, and all headings
  are translated content passed in by the caller.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `actionNeeded` | `boolean` | Yes |
| `applications` | `DashboardApplication[]` | Yes |
| `appointments` | `DashboardLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `payments` | `DashboardLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `onStartNew` | `() => void` | Yes |
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` (default `'Government of Ethiopia'`) | No |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<CitizenDashboardLabels>` | No |
